identity.mission: Create a trustworthy, organic, and data-driven Aggregator OS for carbon credit management.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and metric values.

body.usage: Use for table data, descriptions, and functional text.

mono.usage: Use for transaction IDs, coordinates, and technical data.

primary.name: Forest Canopy
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key branding elements.

secondary.name: Terracotta Soil
secondary.usage: Secondary actions, alerts requiring attention, emphasis.

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A4D2E] text-white hover:bg-[#143C24] shadow-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1A4D2E] border border-[#1A4D2E]/20 hover:bg-[#FDFCF8] hover:border-[#1A4D2E]/50 shadow-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-[#6B7280] hover:text-[#1F2937] hover:bg-gray-100/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all

cards.default: bg-white border border-gray-200/60 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 p-6
cards.metric: flex flex-col justify-between h-full bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-gray-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#1A4D2E] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.header: bg-gray-50/50 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500 border-b border-gray-200
tables.row: bg-white hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0

hero.description: Hands planting seedlings - strong emotional connection to soil
Women kneeling next to tree - community aspect

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' from Google Fonts via 'next/font' or standard import.
Do NOT use gradients for the main background. Use the off-white (#FDFCF8) to keep it clean and professional.
Ensure 'Estimated Units' label is prominent and distinct from 'Certified Credits'.
Use the Bento Grid layout for the main Dashboard Overview.
For the Claims Queue, use a split view: List on left, Map + Evidence Photo on right.
Use the 'Forest Canopy' Green (#1A4D2E) sparingly for primary actions to maintain hierarchy.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics (purple/teal gradients, centered text everywhere).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-6 or p-8 inside cards).
Micro-interactions are mandatory (hover states, subtle scales).
Never use full black (#000000). Use Dark Charcoal (#1F2937).
